title: Revolve Group Inc (RVLV) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Sales Growth and AI Advancements
text: Revolve Group delivered robust fourth-quarter results with net sales of $294 million, representing a 14% year-over-year increase, marking the company's first double-digit growth across all segments in 2.5 years. Profitability metrics improved significantly. The company reported net income reaching $12 million and adjusted EBITDA increasing by 114% year-over-year. Both business segments performed well, with the REVOLVE segment achieving a 15% sales increase and FWRD climbing 11% compared to the prior year quarter. Operational efficiencies gained traction as fulfillment costs declined 27 basis points year-over-year and marketing investments decreased notably. The company also successfully reduced its return rate by over 2 percentage points year-over-year. Management emphasized AI's growing role, noting they made meaningful advancements in AI technology, enhancing customer experience. Adjacent product categories including beauty, men's, and home all experienced double-digit growth. Challenges included a modest 1% decrease in average order value and temporary disruptions from January wildfires in Los Angeles.
